--- 
title: "Ibis adoption metrics"
#author: "Ibis team"
logo: logo.svg
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: darkly
--- 

```{python}
# | echo: false
import ibis

import plotly.express as px

from itables import show
from dotenv import load_dotenv

load_dotenv()

ibis.options.interactive = True

con = ibis.connect("duckdb://md:ibis_analytics")

stars = con.table("stars")

show(stars.to_pandas())
```

## Row {height=100%}

```{python}
# | title: Stars over time
px.line(
    stars,
    x="starred_at",
    y="total_stars",
    title="cumulative stars",
    template="plotly_dark",
)
```

```{python}
# | title: Stars by company
timescale = "week"
px.bar(
    stars.mutate(ibis._.company[:20].name("company"))
    .group_by(
        [ibis._.starred_at.truncate(timescale).name("starred_at"), ibis._.company]
    )
    .agg(ibis._.count().name("stars")),
    x="starred_at",
    y="stars",
    color="company",
    title="stars by company",
    template="plotly_dark",
)
```
